title: Redesign ProcessingScreen layout with logo, animated progress bars with % counter, and simplified upload

requirements.text: Redesign frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx layout to match the reference design (image-7.png): place the app logo/brand mark above the 'Analisando Gráfico' heading, followed by a subtitle line ('Detectando padrões de velas localmente...'). All four processing stages (Carregando imagem, Processando dados, Detectando padrões de candle, Gerando resultado) must be displayed in a card list below. Each stage row shows a circular status icon on the left (pending = dim circle, active = spinning ring, complete = filled green checkmark) and the stage label text on the right. Completed stages show the icon and label in green. The active stage shows the spinning ring with white/bold label. At the bottom of the screen display a small footer line reading 'Análise local — sem envio de dados externos'. Remove any horizontal colored progress bars from the stage rows.

quotes: muda layout igual a segunda imagem com essas informação, deixando logomarca em cima da frase analisando grafico

acceptanceCriteria: App logo appears above the 'Analisando Gráfico' title
Subtitle 'Detectando padrões de velas localmente...' appears below the title
Four stage rows are displayed in a dark card/panel
Completed stages have filled green circle checkmark icons and green text
Active stage has spinning ring icon and white bold text
Pending stages have dim/gray circle icons and gray text
Footer 'Análise local — sem envio de dados externos' is visible at the bottom

requirements.text: Replace the stage icon/status indicators in ProcessingScreen.tsx with animated horizontal loading bars styled in black and white. Each bar must animate from 0% to 100% fill while that stage is active. Display a small percentage counter (e.g., '47%') in a small font beside the right end of each bar, updating as the bar fills. The bars must use a black base track with a white fill that has a glowing/shining brightness effect (e.g., CSS box-shadow or filter: brightness glow on the white fill). Inactive/pending bars are shown as dim dark tracks with no fill. Completed bars remain fully filled in white.

quotes: anima as barra de loading do analise e coloca 1% até 100% pequeno ao lado da barra, as barras em preto e branco mas o branco com efeito brilho

acceptanceCriteria: Each stage row contains an animated horizontal progress bar
Active stage bar animates smoothly from 0% to 100%
A small percentage label (e.g., '73%') is displayed beside the bar and updates in real time
Bar fill color is white with a visible glow/shine CSS effect
Bar track background is dark/black
Completed stage bars remain filled at 100% in white
Pending stage bars are shown as dark empty tracks

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx to simplify the upload interface and ensure it accepts any image input method without restrictions. The page must support: file picker (any image type including screenshots and copies), camera capture, clipboard paste (Ctrl+V / mobile screenshot paste), and drag-and-drop. Remove any file format rejection logic that would block common screenshot formats. Accept PNG, JPG, JPEG, WebP, and any other common image MIME type. The UI must be clean and minimal with Portuguese labels. Do not display complex upload instructions — show a single prominent upload area with a brief label.

quotes: deixando analise do grafico simples aceitando qualquer tipo de carregamento de foto, print, copia

acceptanceCriteria: File picker accepts PNG, JPG, JPEG, WebP, and screenshot file types
Camera capture option is available
Clipboard paste (Ctrl+V) works to capture a copied screenshot
Drag-and-drop upload is supported
No format rejection errors appear for common screenshot files
Upload UI is minimal with Portuguese labels only

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx to display the uploaded chart image as a minimized thumbnail. The thumbnail must be small (approximately 80×60px), positioned in a corner of the results layout (top-right or bottom-right), and must not dominate the results view. Retrieve the image data URL from sessionStorage using the 'chartImage' key. Style the thumbnail with a subtle border and rounded corners consistent with the active dark/light theme.
acceptanceCriteria: Chart thumbnail is rendered at approximately 80×60px
Thumbnail is positioned in the corner of the results layout (not dominating the view)
Image is retrieved from sessionStorage 'chartImage' key
Thumbnail has a subtle border and rounded corners
Thumbnail respects the active dark/light theme

requirements.text: Apply a professional, premium visual polish to the ProcessingScreen. Use a fully dark background (#000 or near-black), large bold typography for the 'Analisando Gráfico' heading, and ensure spacing, padding, and layout proportions give the screen a high-quality trading app appearance. The stage card should have a slightly elevated dark surface (e.g., dark gray card on black background). All text must remain in Portuguese (Brazil).
acceptanceCriteria: ProcessingScreen background is fully dark (black or near-black)
Heading typography is large and bold
Stage list is contained in a dark elevated card panel
Spacing and proportions feel premium and professional
All text labels are in Portuguese (Brazil)

constraints: Do not modify any files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not remove or break existing error handling in ProcessingScreen.tsx (null file, engine errors, erro field handling)
Do not change the local candle analysis engine logic in localCandleAnalysis.ts
All user-facing text must remain in Portuguese (Brazil)
nonGoals: Changing the Results screen layout beyond the thumbnail minimization
Re-introducing any external API or Gemini integration
Changing the analysis logic or localCandleAnalysis.ts engine
Adding new analysis features or fields not mentioned in this request
